_comment: MCP servers for Discord bot. Copy to discord-mcp.json and configure. ${ENV_VAR} syntax is auto-resolved at runtime.

nexus._comment: Context Intelligence Gateway — compresses tool output 98% (315KB → 5.4KB). Required for exec/scan/rag_search/health tools.

serena._comment: Optional — LSP-based code navigation. Enables get_symbols_overview, find_symbol, search_for_pattern. Install: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/serena
